name: Kingshot - Flow 2 Redeem API Loop + Delays

parameters.query:
WITH candidate AS (
    SELECT
        r.id AS redemption_id,
        gc.code AS gift_code,
        ga.player_id,
        ga.nickname,
        ga.server_id
    FROM gift_code_redemptions r
    JOIN gift_codes gc ON gc.id = r.gift_code_id
    JOIN game_accounts ga ON ga.id = r.game_account_id
    WHERE r.status = 'pending'
      AND gc.status = 'active'
      AND ga.is_active = TRUE
      AND (gc.expires_at IS NULL OR gc.expires_at > NOW())
    ORDER BY r.queued_at ASC
    FOR UPDATE OF r SKIP LOCKED
    LIMIT 1
),
claimed AS (
    UPDATE gift_code_redemptions r
    SET
        status = 'processing',
        attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
        updated_at = NOW()
    FROM candidate c
    WHERE r.id = c.redemption_id
    RETURNING r.id
)
SELECT
    c.redemption_id,
    c.gift_code,
    c.player_id,
    c.nickname,
    c.server_id
FROM candidate c
JOIN claimed cl ON cl.id = c.redemption_id;

parameters.name: user-agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/150.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
UPDATE gift_code_redemptions
SET
    status = $1,
    response_message = $2,
    response_data = $3::jsonb,
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $4::uuid
  AND status = 'processing'
RETURNING
    id,
    status,
    attempt_count,
    response_message,
    processed_at;
